title: Sour Silky Energizing British Banana Smoothie
description: A revitalizing smoothie made with baking powder to enhance its energizing properties and using a pressure cooker for efficiency.

ingredients.name: Bananas
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe but not mushy bananas.

ingredients.name: Baking Powder
ingredients.notes: For best results, use quick-rise baking powder.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use filtered water for a clearer smoothie.

ingredients.name: Milk or Soy Milk
ingredients.notes: Choose unsweetened milk to control sweetness.

instructions: Place bananas in the pressure cooker, ensuring they are fully crushed.
Add baking powder and water. Close the cooker and cook for approximately 1 minute on high pressure.
Allow the mixture to naturally release steam (this helps create a silky texture).
Once cooled slightly, blend until smooth, adding more milk or soy milk if needed for desired consistency.
Serving suggestion: Top with a sprinkle of cinnamon for an extra flavor boost.
